classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图中对应'动力线 Power Wire'表格，表内列出'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'颜色 COLOR'、'WIRE GAGE'，并将针脚1至4分别对应'U相 MOTOR U'、'V相 MOTOR V'、'W相 MOTOR W'、'PE相 MOTOR PE⊥'及线色和'14AWG'线径，属于动力连接器接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机技术参数表，包含可见的'Rated Torque'、'Rated Speed'、'Maximum torque'、'Standstill torque'以及rpm和N.m等转矩转速性能参数；在给定类别中最接近电机转矩转速性能信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标区域为电机'Performance Curve'图，含纵轴'T(N.m)'、横轴'n(rpm)'，并标出'Intermittent'与'Continuous'工作区及7.17、2.63、2.39、2200、3900等扭矩和转速关键点，表达扭矩随转速变化的性能关系。

text_annotations.correction_note: Title of the performance curve graph
Y-axis label for torque in Newton-meters
X-axis label for speed in revolutions per minute
Label for intermittent torque operation curve
Label for continuous torque operation curve

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: N·m for torque, rpm for speed

terminology_notes: n(rpm) represents rotational speed in revolutions per minute

dimension_records.reason: Peak torque value for intermittent operation clearly labeled on curve
Continuous operation torque value at low speed region
Speed annotation marking transition or reference point on curve
Speed annotation marking end of continuous operation range
Torque value at specific point on performance curve

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: This is a performance curve graph showing torque-speed characteristics for intermittent and continuous operation modes. Peak intermittent torque is 7.17 N·m. Continuous torque ranges from 2.63 N·m at low speeds to operation up to 3900 rpm. Key speed points marked at 2200 and 3900 rpm.

unresolved_items.issue: OCR ocr_008 detected '9' but visually this appears to be part of axis numbering, likely '6' based on context
unresolved_items.recommendation: Manual verification needed for Y-axis scale value at this position

unresolved_items.issue: OCR ocr_020 detected '900' which may be fragment or partial reading
unresolved_items.recommendation: Appears to be duplicate or partial detection near 3900 rpm annotation

unresolved_items.issue: OCR ocr_023 detected '000' with low confidence and unusual angle, likely noise or curve artifact
unresolved_items.recommendation: Excluded as likely false detection from graph elements

unresolved_items.issue: OCR ocr_006 detected single dash character with low confidence
unresolved_items.recommendation: Excluded as likely grid line or axis mark misidentified as text

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框位于整张机械图右下方标题栏附近的修订表区域，可见表格字段'VER'和版本值'V1.1'，属于机械图纸版次/标题栏信息；不包含针脚功能、线色、反馈信号或扭矩转速曲线，因此在给定类别中最接近机械尺寸类图纸附属信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
